calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Probate Of Will And Letters Testamentary
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 6, 1991, is admitted to probate. Andrew Der is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
